title: Translucent Lava
description: simple mod which makes lava look like water
body:
# Translucent lava
simple minecraft mod which makes lava look like water

Usage: ``/lava`` to enable/disable

Credits: [valkeea](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishyaddons)


![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a441a63792db049d3cd59b1502d7c2fa3916cbc_0.webp)
